scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c blue,green "npm run server" "npm run web"
scripts.demo: node --experimental-strip-types -e "const{analyzeAudio}=require('./packages/analyzer/src/index.ts');const{prepareTrack,InfiniteBeats}=require('./packages/jukebox/src/index.ts');const f=process.argv[1]||'test.mp4';analyzeAudio(f,{logProgress:true}).then(a=>{const t=prepareTrack(a);const b=t.analysis.beats;const n=b.filter(x=>x.neighbors&&x.neighbors.length>0);console.log('Beats:',b.length,'with neighbors:',n.length);const j=new InfiniteBeats(t);let prev=-1,br=0;for(let i=0;i<100;i++){const beat=j.nextBeat();if(prev>=0&&beat.which!==prev+1)br++;prev=beat.which}console.log('Branches in 100 beats:',br)}).catch(e=>{console.error(e.message);process.exit(1)})"
